summary: Critical search optimization for vinyl collector platform - ALL 12 FEATURES TESTED AND PASSED. Backend tests: 16/16 passed. Frontend UI tests: All visual checks passed. The search system correctly: (1) Indexes variant metadata including notes, label, catno, (2) Prioritizes collector intent with RSD/limited/exclusive keywords ranking higher, (3) Expands synonyms (rsd→record store day), (4) Searches both records AND discogs_releases collections, (5) Supports partial matches, (6) Shows collector tags on variant cards.
critical_code_review_comments: Synonym expansion (SYNONYMS dict in search.py) correctly maps rsd→record store day, limited→limited edition, picture disc→picture disc, etc.
_variant_score_v2 scoring function properly prioritizes: collector keywords (200-250 points), artist match (120 points), year match (+100 bonus)
Tags extraction from notes field works correctly for RSD, Limited, Exclusive, Numbered, Signed, Test Pressing, Tour
Both records and discogs_releases collections are queried and merged with deduplication by discogs_id
Frontend VariantCard component correctly displays tags as black pills with white text
Year display in card title using conditional span: {v.year ? (v.year) : null}
seed_data_creation: No test data created - tested against existing database (163 records, 116 discogs_releases)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Search optimization fully functional. Key test queries: 'Taylor Swift RSD' returns 105 results with RSD variants prioritized (scores 490, 460, 460 for top 3), 'swift 2018' returns 59 results with 2018 variants at top, 'limited exclusive' returns variants with both tags. Discovery sections work: trending, rare, most_wanted, recently_added all functional.

features_tested.taylor_swift_rsd_prioritization: PASS - Top 3 results all have RSD tag (scores: 490, 460, 460)

features_tested.swift_2018_year_matching: PASS - 2018 variants prioritized (Fearless 2018 at top with score 225)
features_tested.limited_exclusive_search: PASS - Returns variants with Limited (8/10) and Exclusive (10/10) tags
features_tested.picture_disc_synonym: PASS - Returns picture disc variants via synonym expansion
features_tested.variant_tags_array: PASS - All variants have tags array with collector metadata
features_tested.variant_year_display: PASS - Year shown in card title as (YYYY)
features_tested.variant_wantlist_count: PASS - Wantlist field present in response
features_tested.albums_section: PASS - 8 albums shown (e.g., Fearless, Lover, Red with variant counts)
features_tested.artists_section: PASS - 3 artists shown (Taylor Swift, Post Malone, Brendon Urie)
features_tested.discovery_sections_empty_state: PASS - Trending, Rare, Most Wanted, Recently Added all visible

api_verification.GET /api/search/variants?q=Taylor+Swift+: 200 OK - RSD variants prioritized at top
